name: QRadar Audit: QRadar Hosts
notes: This rule adds QRadar IP addresses to the QRadar Deployment – IP reference set.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Health Metrics
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: QRadar Hosts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Health Metrics
RED_list: Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "QRadar Deployment"
